name: transcreveai
description: Turn videos into evidence-backed knowledge dossiers for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze videos and save them as Codex knowledge.
interface.longDescription: TranscreveAI lets Codex probe video sources, create multimodal dossiers, index runs for retrieval, and answer questions grounded in generated artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Turn these reels into reusable knowledge.
Ask my TranscreveAI runs for evidence.
